prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity — computed result.** Method used: chemkit `fukui-reactivity` with DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (functional `b3lyp`, basis `def2-tzvp`, tier `standard`) using PySCF Mulliken charges, **gas phase**, neutral reference charge 0 and multiplicity 1. Geometry provenance: user-supplied XYZ used as provided: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms). For the finite-difference Fukui functions, chemkit also evaluated the cation (+1, doublet) and anion (-1, doublet). Software version was not returned by the tool.

Headline result: the largest electrophilic Fukui index, **f+ = 1.9242931**, occurs at **atom 5 (C)**. The largest nucleophilic Fukui index, **f− = 0.1616371**, also occurs at **atom 5 (C)**.

Per-atom Fukui results from the tool:

| Atom | Element | f+ | f− | f0 | Dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | -1.3316182 | 0.08382155 | -0.62389834 | -1.4154398 |
| 2 | C | 1.2286866 | 0.089103093 | 0.65889485 | 1.1395835 |
| 3 | C | 1.2270264 | 0.089304821 | 0.65816561 | 1.1377216 |

| 6 | H | -1.2190639 | 0.10248412 | -0.55828991 | -1.3215481 |
| 7 | H | -1.2191056 | 0.1025135 | -0.55829603 | -1.321619 |
| 8 | H | -0.76678308 | 0.10481615 | -0.33098346 | -0.87159923 |
| 9 | H | -0.76674059 | 0.10479266 | -0.33097396 | -0.87153325 |

Reproducibility: command returned by chemkit was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmph3isxdjk/live.json`.
